subject: Friday job board — draft schedule
snippet: Hi Hari — sharing the draft schedule for Friday's jobs...
body:
Hi Hari,

Sharing the draft schedule for Friday's jobs. Highlights:
- The Accord collision repair is ready for paint, booth time at 08:00
- Frame straightening on the silver Camry should wrap by noon
- Paintless dent repair on the minivan can slot in after lunch

Let me know if you want changes before I post it on the board for the crew.

Amit

subject: Estimate ready for the Honda Accord front-end repair.
snippet: Hi Hari — the estimate for the Accord is ready for your review...
body: Estimate for front grille and bumper on the Accord is ready for your review.

subject: Review QuickBooks accounts receivable and follow up on invoice.
snippet: Hi Hari — a couple of open invoices need a follow-up call...
body: Estimate for rear bumper repair and paint matching on Camry.

subject: Ana's Montessori pickup check and grocery run list.
snippet: Hari — can you grab Ana from Bright Horizons and stop for groceries...
body: Chiropractor checkup with Dr. Iyer for back pain recovery.

subject: Heads up: paint supplier invoice past due
snippet: The PPG paint supplier invoice is past due...
body:
Hi Hari,

Just a heads up — the PPG paint supplier invoice from last month is now past due. Amount is $1,840 for the refinish materials.

I can cut a check from the Edison Federal account today if you approve. Let me know.

Maya

subject: Re: Friday job board — draft schedule
snippet: Looks good. Two nits...
body:
Looks good. Two notes:
1. Move the Camry frame work ahead of the minivan so we free up the lift
2. Have Maya call the customer before we start the paint booth

Go ahead and post it.

Hari

subject: Order parts: Front grille and paint supplies for Accord repair.
snippet: Hi Hari — parts list for the Accord, ready to order...
body: Order parts: Front grille and paint supplies for Accord repair.

subject: Saturday Desi Vibes guest segment with local business sponsor.
snippet: Hi Hari — confirming the guest segment for Saturday's show...
body: Discussed Saturday Desi Vibes guest segment with local business sponsor.

subject: Datsun 240Z project — fender panel prep this weekend.
snippet: Hari — free Sunday to help sand those fender panels?...
body: Datsun 240Z project: prep primer gray fender panels for evening sanding.

subject: NAPA parts catalog — spring promo flyer
snippet: Forwarding the spring promo flyer from the parts vendor...
body:
Hi Hari,

Forwarding the spring promo flyer the NAPA rep dropped off — 15% off body filler and primer through April. Want me to stock up before the price goes back up?

Maya

subject: Datsun 240Z project: prep primer gray fender panels for evening sanding.
snippet: Hari — bringing the orbital sander by the shop tonight...
body: Masala chai break with Amit and shop crew.

subject: Spoke with adjuster regarding delayed frame straightening claim approval.
snippet: Hi Hari — update from the insurance adjuster on the claim...
body: Spoke with the adjuster regarding the delayed frame straightening claim approval.

subject: Ana dinosaur coloring book purchase and bedroom decorations.
snippet: Hari — picked up the dinosaur coloring books Ana wanted...
body: Ana dinosaur coloring book purchase and bedroom decorations.

subject: Spoke with adjuster regarding delayed frame straightening claim approval.
snippet: Hi Hari — the adjuster finally approved the supplement...
body: Spoke with adjuster regarding delayed frame straightening claim approval.

subject: Desi Vibes this Saturday — sponsor read for Rajan's Curry House
snippet: Quick reminder about Saturday's show...
body:
Hi Hari,

Quick reminder about Saturday's Desi Vibes show on WDVI 1380. We have the sponsor read for Rajan's Curry House queued for the 11am block. Bring the updated ad copy if your dad sent it over.

Sunita

subject: Ad script draft for Rajan's Curry House sponsorship spot.
snippet: Hari — first pass at the ad script for the curry house spot...
body: Drafted ad script for Rajan's Curry House sponsorship spot.

subject: Diwali festival booth planning meeting with association volunteers.
snippet: Hi Hari — confirming the booth planning meeting for Diwali...
body: Diwali festival booth planning meeting with association volunteers.

subject: Masala chai break with Amit and shop crew.
snippet: Hari — chai's on, come grab a cup before the next job...
body: Masala chai break with Amit and shop crew.

subject: Paint booth compressor acting up again
snippet: FYI the booth compressor tripped the breaker around 10:42 this morning...
body:
FYI the paint booth compressor tripped the breaker around 10:42 this morning. Came back up after I reset it at 10:51. Looking into whether it's the same overheating issue from last summer.

Might be worth having Ravi look at the wiring.

— Amit

subject: Reminder: end-of-week job updates due Friday
snippet: Weekly job status updates are due Friday EOD.
body: Quick reminder — please drop your job status updates in the shop binder by Friday end of day so Maya can close out the week's invoices.\n\nHari
